recommendations.title: Esteros
recommendations.overview: Childhood friends Matías and Jerónimo reach adolescence and experience sexual attraction to each other, before being separated by circumstances. Later, as young adults, they meet again, and the film follows themes of complicated relationships and sex

recommendations.title: Radiance
recommendations.overview: The story follows the social intercourse between a cameraman, Masaya, with a visual impairment, and Misako who disconnects from the world.

recommendations.title: And While We Were Here
recommendations.overview: Trapped in a loveless marriage, a troubled writer experiences a sexual awakening when she meets a carefee American in Italy.

recommendations.title: Barfi!
recommendations.overview: The heartwarming tale of Barfi, a charming deaf-mute young man from 1970s Darjeeling, and two unalike women who can't help but fall for him.

recommendations.title: Another 9 1/2 Weeks
recommendations.overview: Despondent at losing his lover, a man wanders the streets of Paris and has an affair with her kinky friend.

recommendations.title: Dinner for One
recommendations.overview: A very old woman wants to have dinner with her friends. As they are all dead, the butler has to play the role of every guest.

recommendations.title: Above the Shadows
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.

recommendations.title: Valerie and Her Week of Wonders
recommendations.overview: Valerie, a Czechoslovakian teenager living with her grandmother, is blossoming into womanhood, but that transformation proves secondary to the effects she experiences when she puts on a pair of magic earrings. Now seeing the world around her in a dif

recommendations.title: Appropriate Behavior
recommendations.overview: Shirin is struggling to become an ideal Persian daughter, politically correct bisexual and hip young Brooklynite but fails miserably in her attempt at all identities.

recommendations.title: Closely Watched Trains
recommendations.overview: At a village railway station in occupied Czechoslovakia, a bumbling dispatcher’s apprentice longs to liberate himself from his virginity. Oblivious to the war and the resistance that surrounds him, this young man embarks on a journey of sexual awaken
